queries.question: List all  film festivals and their categories.
queries.sql: select film_festivals.name , categories.categoryname from Film_Festival_Categories join Categories on Film_Festival_Categories.categoryId = Categories.id join Film_Festivals on Film_Festival_Categories.festivalId = Film_Festivals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?categoryname WHERE {
  ?film_festival_categories a :Film_Festival_Categories .
  ?categories a :Categories .
  ?film_festival_categories p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?film_festivals a :Film_Festivals .
  ?film_festival_categories p:hasFilm_Festivals ?film_festivals .
  ?film_festivals p:name ?name .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname .
}

queries.question: What film categories does each film festival offer?
queries.sql: SELECT Categories.categoryName  from Film_Festival_Categories join Categories on Film_Festival_Categories.categoryId = Categories.id join Film_Festivals on Film_Festival_Categories.festivalId = Film_Festivals.id   GROUP BY Film_Festival_Categories.categoryId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Film_Festival_Categories.festivalId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Film_Festivals)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What film categories does each film festival offer?
